title: Department Manager Vacancy at Evok International Enterprises - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Department Manager Vacancy at Evok International Enterprises - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Evok International Enterprises is actively seeking a talented and motivated Department Manager to join our dynamic team in Nashik. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Evok International Enterprises:
Evok International Enterprises is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Life and accident insurance
• Professional development and training programs
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Nashik, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Evok International Enterprises!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
